form.formComment: Last start finished 4th on March 26 over 461m at Hobart behind Stanmore beaten 16 lengths (26.92) in a Grade 4/5. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 278m in 16.06. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when seventh over 278m at this track at Other level. Solid claims this line-up.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 278m. Last start finished 6th on April 2 over 461m at Hobart behind Seaton beaten 10 lengths (26.67) in a Free For All. Has clocked a scorching 15.82 here at this trip. Leading player.
